sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in sources

special_mechanics.name: Star Attack/Platform
special_mechanics.description: Primary mechanic: player spawns stars above character's horn. Stars function as both offensive projectiles to defeat enemies and as rideable platforms to reach otherwise inaccessible areas.

special_mechanics.name: Jump
special_mechanics.description: Player character can jump; core platforming mechanic

tier_notes: Tier 1 (empirical/qualitative) - No quantitative physics parameters documented in available sources. Sources provide game design philosophy, development techniques, and feature descriptions but not precise movement values, gravity constants, or sub-pixel calculations. Game designed by Tomomi Sakai with emphasis on high-quality presentation rivaling Super Famicom titles through advanced tileset algorithms.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Gimmick! article)
